description_long: This is a large, colorful hot air balloon with a spherical envelope divided into vertical segments of white, purple, pink, yellow, and orange. A prominent teal star graphic is printed across two of the orange segments, giving it a playful and eye-catching appearance. The balloon's basket is a classic woven style, suspended beneath the envelope by visible ropes and metal framework. The basket is brown and appears sturdy, with small details such as handles and a burner assembly visible. The surface of the balloon is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of synthetic balloon fabric. The overall design is festive and would stand out in parks, plazas, or urban events.
description: A large, multicolored hot air balloon with a teal star graphic and a classic brown basket suspended below. The surface is smooth and glossy, with distinct color segments and detailed basket features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the teal star graphic on orange and white segments, with the basket and ropes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rotated view highlighting the star graphic on orange and yellow segments, with the basket directly below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the plain color segments (white, purple, yellow, pink) with no graphics visible.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing pink and purple segments, basket visible, no graphics present.
